plugins.name: ui-skills
plugins.description: Reverse-engineer any live website into production-ready React + Tailwind code. Reads actual computed CSS, DOM structure, JS interactions, and animations — not just a screenshot. Downloads visual assets (favicon, title, images) and extracts inline SVGs verbatim. Auto-detects responsive breakpoints via viewport sweep. Detects scroll behavior (scroll-snap, smooth scroll, overscroll-behavior) and extracts JS scroll library configs (Lenis, GSAP ScrollSmoother, Locomotive). Auto-detects custom scroll containers and portal-escaped fixed elements inside transform wrappers. Section-by-section viewport-resized screenshots. Animation detection pipeline: 3-phase motion detection (idle → scroll → per-element tracking). Mouse-follow interaction detection (parallax tilt, custom cursors, image tooltips). Stroke-based SVG hover animation extraction. Pre-generation audit: typography scale consistency, multi-state interaction table, decorative SVG inventory. Tailwind v4 custom font registration and viewport-relative font sizing. Verifies output with DOM clip screenshot pixel diff (AE/SSIM) as the Visual Gate; getComputedStyle numerical diagnosis always runs in parallel. Post-generation style audit compares class-level computed styles between ref and impl. Includes sub-skills for precise animation extraction (WAAPI, canvas/WebGL, scroll-driven JS), visual baseline capture & comparison, trigger-type-aware recording, and timestamp-based scroll crop.
